product_overview: A web-based dashboard to manage routers, customers, billing packages, vouchers and payment gateways with real-time metrics and transaction logs. The product provides authentication, client onboarding, router setup wizards, package and voucher management, and financial/transaction reporting.
core_goals: Provide secure user authentication and session management for administrators.
Allow operators to add and manage clients (Hotspot/PPPoE) and customer lifecycle (active, banned, expired, extend).
Manage MikroTik routers including onboarding wizards and configuration downloads.
Create and manage billing packages with bandwidth and duration controls.
Support voucher generation and print/delete workflows for prepaid access.
Capture and display financial transactions and integrate multiple payment gateways (M-Pesa, Paybill, HarakaPay, PalmPesa, ZenoPay, etc.).
Visualize key business metrics (revenue, subscribers, router status) on a dashboard with charts and summary cards.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Login, registration, password recovery and session management for admin users.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill username input -> Fill password input -> Click Login button -> See dashboard at /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill username input -> Fill password input (invalid) -> Click Login button -> See error message on /login
Navigate to /register -> Fill registration fields -> Click Register button -> See onboarding/confirmation (registration success)
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email/phone -> Click Submit -> Receive OTP -> Fill OTP -> Set new password -> See confirmation -> Navigate to /login
Navigate to /forgot-password -> Fill email/phone -> Click Submit -> Receive OTP (invalid) -> Enter wrong OTP -> See OTP validation error on /forgot-password

features.name: Client Registration & Management
features.description: Add new clients (Hotspot and PPPoE), view client lists, change status (Active, Banned, Disabled, Suspended), and manage expired subscriptions.
user_flows: Navigate to /clients -> Click Add Client button -> Fill client details form -> Click Save -> See new client in client list
Navigate to /clients -> Click Add Client button -> Fill client details form (missing required field) -> Click Save -> See validation error on the form
Navigate to /clients -> Locate client row -> Click Actions -> Select 'Ban' -> Confirm action -> See client status update to Banned in the list
Navigate to /clients -> Filter list by 'Expired' -> Select an expired subscriber -> Click 'Extend' -> Fill extension details -> Click Save -> See updated expiry date

features.name: Dashboard Visualization
features.description: Overview page showing revenue analytics, subscriber growth, router status, system activity and top users via charts and summary cards.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> See revenue charts -> See subscriber growth card -> See router status summary (Online/Offline counts)
Navigate to /dashboard -> See system monitor (CPU, Memory, Disk, Network traffic) -> Observe real-time traffic values load
Navigate to /dashboard -> API GET /api/dashboard returns error -> See dashboard error/fallback UI and a Retry button -> Click Retry -> API call reattempted
Navigate to /dashboard -> Use 'Filter by Router' dropdown -> Select specific router -> See dashboard metrics refresh for selected router (filtered view)

features.name: Router Management (Mikrotiks)
features.description: Add and manage MikroTik routers, configure VPN mode (WireGuard/OpenVPN/Hybrid), download setup scripts and follow setup wizard instructions.
user_flows: Navigate to /routers -> Click +add new router -> Fill Access Code -> Fill Router Name -> Select VPN Configuration Mode -> Click Create router -> See setup instructions and configuration download links
Navigate to /routers -> Click +add new router -> Fill Router Name (invalid characters) -> Click Create router -> See validation error on Router Name
Navigate to /routers -> On a router row click 'Download' (OVPN/RSC) -> Receive file download -> Follow on-screen 'Router Setup Wizard' instructions to import RSC and verify connection
Navigate to /routers -> Select a router -> Click 'Verify Connection' -> System attempts to connect -> See 'Online' status or 'Connection failed' error

features.name: Package Management
features.description: Create, edit and manage service packages (Hotspot/PPPoE/Static IP) including duration, bandwidth, router assignment and hotspot settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /packages -> Click +add package -> Select Package Type (Hotspot/PPPoE/Static) -> Fill Name -> Set Price -> Configure Duration & Router -> Configure Upload/Download speeds -> Click +add package -> See package appear in package list
Navigate to /packages -> Click +add package -> Fill Name -> Leave Price empty -> Click +add package -> See validation error 'Price is required' on the form
Navigate to /packages -> In package list click 'Edit' on a package -> Change Upload Speed -> Click Save -> See updated bandwidth displayed in the list
Navigate to /packages -> Use Filter 'AllStatus' -> Select 'Inactive' -> See only inactive packages listed

features.name: Payment Gateways & Channels
features.description: Configure and toggle payment gateways (M-Pesa Paybill/Till, HarakaPay, PalmPesa, ZenoPay), set credentials, register C2B URLs and test gateway activation.
user_flows: Navigate to /transactions -> Scroll to Payment Setup -> Toggle M-Pesa gateway to Enable -> Fill Consumer Key and Consumer Secret -> Click Save -> See 'Gateway enabled' confirmation
Navigate to /transactions -> Toggle M-Pesa gateway to Enable -> Leave Consumer Key empty -> Click Save -> See validation error 'Consumer Key is required'
Navigate to /transactions -> In Payment Setup click 'Register C2B URL' -> System attempts to register URL -> See success message 'C2B URL registered' or see error if registration fails
Navigate to /transactions -> Configure HarakaPay API Key -> Click Save -> Click Test Payment -> See test payment response and automatic verification status

features.name: Voucher Codes
features.description: Generate, print, delete and manage prepaid voucher codes and view voucher usage and status (used/unused).
user_flows: Navigate to /transactions -> Click Vouchers section -> Click Add voucher -> Fill Plan Name and Voucher Code -> Select Router -> Click Save -> See voucher listed in Vouchers table
Navigate to /transactions -> Click Vouchers section -> Click Add voucher -> Fill Code that already exists -> Click Save -> See error 'Voucher code already exists' on the form
Navigate to /transactions -> In Vouchers table select multiple unused vouchers -> Click Print -> Browser prints selected voucher batch or shows print preview
Navigate to /transactions -> Filter vouchers by Router -> Select '(all routers)' -> See vouchers for all routers listed

features.name: Transactions Log & Mobile Transactions
features.description: Track all payment transactions (M-Pesa, bank deposits, manual payments), view transaction details, export logs and filter by status (Paid, Unpaid, Failed).
user_flows: Navigate to /transactions -> See payment records table with Username, Plan Name, Amount, Type, Created Date -> Click a row -> See transaction detail modal
Navigate to /transactions -> Use Transaction filters to select 'Failed' -> See only failed transactions listed -> Click Export -> Download CSV of filtered transactions
Navigate to /transactions -> Click +add transaction -> Fill transaction details manually -> Click Save -> See new transaction in transactions table
Navigate to /transactions -> Perform search 'Transaction ID' -> No matching results -> See 'Showing 0 entries' and suggestion to widen search

features.name: Client Registration
features.description: Add new clients to the system

features.name: Dashboard Visualization
features.description: Charts and summary cards for business metrics
